workLog.entry: Created isolated worktree from remote PR head f592972a and merged origin/main.
Resolved review threads for em dash, main complexity, PR description version mismatch, and Bugbot console exit summary.
Added extensionless Bash shebang scanning, fail-closed read-error reporting, and console exit-code consistency tests.
Fixed push-blocker in detect_agent_drift.py so known merge-resolver vendored drift is advisory while other vendored drift still blocks.

Process bugs observed: pre-commit prints success despite taste-lints errors; setting TMPDIR inside the repo makes full pytest create fixture manifests that validate_plugin_manifests scans as real manifests; get_pr_checks polling saw one GitHub 504.

nextSteps: Commit latest main merge resolution and this session log.
Apply docstring fixes requested by new review threads, push, poll CI, and rerun completion gate.
